feature.name: QuickBooks Migration Requirements
feature.description: Document QuickBooks integration migration from FileMaker to backend/Supabase

standing_constraints: DO NOT modify backend infrastructure or database schema
Follow Backend Change Protocol for any backend requirements
Document only - do not implement code changes yet
Reference existing code files with line numbers

tasks.title: Create README.md with QuickBooks overview
tasks.description: Create requirements/quickbooks/README.md documenting current QuickBooks integration, FileMaker dependencies, and migration objectives
tasks.implementation_notes: Implemented a comprehensive QuickBooks integration requirements document in 'requirements/quickbooks/README.md' (about 1,044 lines) capturing the current architecture (including 'quickbooksApi.js' HMAC-SHA256 auth and invoice business rules), FileMaker dependencies (via 'financialSyncService.js' and the 'devRecords' layout), and the full data flow through Supabase to QuickBooks. The README also specifies migration objectives to remove FileMaker reliance, including a new 'useCustomerSales' hook, files to deprecate, and a detailed acceptance criteria and test plan, while explicitly deciding on no backend code changes per the backend change protocol. Verified the file creation and confirmed the project builds successfully with no errors.

tasks.title: Document current QuickBooks implementation
tasks.description: Create current-implementation.md analyzing initializeQuickBooks function, FileMaker script behavior, existing quickbooksApi.js client, and UI integration points
tasks.implementation_notes: Created a comprehensive 'current-implementation.md' (1,028 lines) documenting the existing QuickBooks integration in Clarity CRM Frontend, including architecture (FileMaker WebViewer vs standalone), data flows, auth, limitations, and the migration direction. The work referenced and summarized key existing implementations in 'src/api/fileMaker.js' (including 'initializeQuickBooks'), 'src/api/quickbooksApi.js' (backend-integrated client with HMAC-SHA256 and OAuth flow), and 'src/services/invoiceGenerationService.js' (invoice numbering, tax rules, due dates, and line grouping), plus UI touchpoints like 'src/components/financial/CustomerSalesTable.jsx' and sync services. No code changes were made; the build was verified to compile successfully, and the main decision was to produce a documentation-only, line-number-accurate snapshot to support subsequent migration planning.

tasks.title: Map QuickBooks data model requirements
tasks.description: Create data-model-mapping.md documenting token storage requirements, organization configuration, QB entity mappings, and Supabase schema needs
tasks.implementation_notes: Created comprehensive 'requirements/quickbooks/data-model-mapping.md' (986 lines) documenting complete data architecture for QuickBooks migration. Covers: (1) Token storage requirements with 'quickbooks_tokens' table schema for OAuth 2.0 credentials, (2) Organization configuration via 'organization_quickbooks_config' table for QB-specific settings (tax codes, item IDs, invoice numbering), (3) QB entity mappings for customers, invoices, and items with new 'quickbooks_invoices' tracking table, (4) Enhanced 'customer_sales' schema with 'invoice_id', 'billed_status', and deprecation of FileMaker 'financial_id', (5) Complete data transformation mappings from FileMaker→Supabase→QuickBooks with code references to 'invoiceGenerationService.js' and 'financialSyncService.js', and (6) Backend change requirements summary referencing Backend Change Protocol. All code references verified with actual line numbers. No code changes made - documentation only per standing constraints.

tasks.title: Define QuickBooks API contracts
tasks.description: Create api-contracts.md specifying backend endpoints for QB initialization, OAuth flow, token refresh, invoice generation, customer sync, and testing operations

tasks.title: Document authorization requirements
tasks.description: Create authorization.md covering OAuth flow, token lifecycle, organization scoping, RLS policies, and security considerations

tasks.title: Create migration plan
tasks.description: Create migration-plan.md with step-by-step approach to migrate from FileMaker scripts to backend API, including rollback procedures and cutover strategy

tasks.title: Define acceptance criteria and test plan
tasks.description: Create acceptance-criteria.md with test cases covering OAuth flow, token refresh, invoice generation, error handling, retry logic, and edge cases

tasks.title: Create backend change request document
tasks.description: Create BACKEND_CHANGE_REQUEST_001_QUICKBOOKS_MIGRATION.md following the backend change protocol with SQL, API contracts, testing requirements, and rollback plan
